titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 149: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 149. (A.R. No. 617 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Anantīśvara temple.

This records an endowment of half a vēli and one mā of land, in two pieces, six mā and 1/4 chey (vēli) in extent respectively to the temple of Tirumuḷḷūr-uḍaiyār Paramēśvara at Muḷḷūr alias Siṁhavishṇu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Kānāḍu on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri) as śrībalippuṟam, for the maintenance of seven persons playing music (two persons playing kāḷam, one playing śegaṇḍikai and four uvachchars during the śrībali service) in the temple by Kāḷi Kaṟṟaḷi, a member of the karikālasōḻa-teriñja-kaikōḷar (regiment). The land is stated to have been situated west of the village Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and to have been purchased from the sabhā of Muḷḷūr, who agreed to pay the taxes thereon with the interest on 60 kāśu received by them from the donor for the purpose and also authorised the irrigation of the land from the local tank.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 352.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu vaṭakarai kānāṭṭu prahmadeyam muḷḷurākiya siṅhaviṣṇuccaturvvedi maṅgalattu tirumuḷḷuruṭaiya parameśvararkku Uṭaiyār karikāla coḻatteriñca kaikoḷaril kāḷi kaṟṟaḷiye ṉivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal nāṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nila mivvūr kiḻin śrīviranārāyaṇacaturvvedimaṅgalattellai varampukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai Ūrveli varampukku
vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Inilattukkup pāyu muṭciṟu vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kārampicceṭṭār nilattukku teṟku mivvicainta nālellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilamaṟumāvu mivvūr vaṭakaḻaṉi Oṭaivāykkālukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai murukkaṇṭi trivikramapaṭṭaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ānicittar nilattukkum kuḷattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai śrīviranārāyaṇaccaturvvedimaṅgalattellai varampukku teṟku minnālellaiyilakappaṭṭa nilam kāl
Ikkāl ceyyumaṟumāc ceyyumāka varaiye yorumā nila minnilattuk kuḷattu niriṟaikkap peṟuvatākavum Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Innilam Iparameśvararkkum kāḷa miraṇṭum ceykaṇṭikaiyum Uvaccu nālumāka Ivveḻāḷukkum candrādityavat śrībalipuṟamāka Itirumuḷḷūruṭaiya parameśvararkku kuṭutteṉ kāḷi kaṟṟaḷiyeṉ Ikkāḷi kaṟṟaḷiyiṭai tu sabhaiyo minnilam Araiye yoru māvukkum Iṟai kāttuk kuṭuppatāka Ivaṉpakkal koṇṭa
kācu Aṟupatum Ivvaṟupatu kāciṉ palicaiyāl cantrādityavat Iṟai
kāttuk kuṭuppomāṉo mit tirumuḷḷūr parameśvararkku sabhai
yom Ivai panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
